prohibit manipulative design practices that undermine informed user choice.

paragraphs.text: The Digital Fairness Act is an important step toward protecting consumers in the digital marketplace. To be effective, it must address the recurring problem of digital productsespecially gamesbecoming inaccessible after purchase due to publisher decisions. Consumers should have a guaranteed right to access what they have paid for, even if online services are discontinued. The Act should also prohibit manipulative design practices that undermine informed user choice. By enforcing these principles, the Act can ensure genuine fairness and trust in digital transactions.
